evals.prompt: /ProjectTracker Implement rate-limit hardening for auth callbacks and keep tracking synced.
evals.expected_output: Prompts for or resolves the active ticket, enforces project map lookup/setup, moves work into progress, applies timer gating from configuration, and defines closeout transitions.
expectations: Requires project mapping lookup before implementation.
Requires ticket resolution or explicit prompt for missing ticket id.
Requires timer gating by useTimeTracking/enabled flags before any timer start.
Requires ticket transition and time stop/log on closeout.

evals.prompt: /ProjectTracker AIA-431 Build a new ingestion retry monitor and mirror work to our internal ClickUp board.
evals.expected_output: Uses Jira ticket AIA-431 as parent, creates or locates mirrored child ticket in ClickUp when configured, and tracks linkage for later updates.
expectations: Routes the provided Jira key to Jira using configured ticket pattern.
Creates or resolves child tracker ticket when replication is enabled.
Stores or reuses cross-system ticket linkage.
Maintains ticket status synchronization through closeout.

evals.prompt: /ProjectTracker SL-7007 Fix PDF upload timeout and log time in Everhour.
evals.expected_output: Routes custom-id task to ClickUp, binds the time tracking provider to Everhour when configured and enabled, and records install/fallback behavior if Everhour connector is unavailable.
expectations: Routes SL-7007 to ClickUp based on custom id pattern/prefix.
Attempts Everhour provider before internal fallback.
Asks permission to install Everhour MCP before attempting install.
Prefers direct/vendor/self-hosted Everhour MCP and avoids third-party bridge signup by default.
Attempts connector installation when permission is granted.
Finishes with explicit time logging outcome.

evals.prompt: /ProjectTracker Create subtasks for API docs, validation tests, and release notes under the active parent ticket and start each one only when work begins.
evals.expected_output: Creates scoped subtasks under the active parent item, assigns and transitions each subtask to in progress only when started, and keeps remaining subtasks unstarted.
expectations: Uses parent ticket context before creating subtasks.
Creates multiple subtasks when the work is multi-step.
Transitions only active subtasks to in progress.
Keeps non-started subtasks in backlog/todo state.

evals.prompt: /ProjectTracker Use Linear as the client board and Harvest for time tracking for this project. Configure support automatically if not already available.
evals.expected_output: Discovers non-built-in provider support, asks permission before MCP install, attempts installation/configuration, and maps provider routing instead of assuming Jira/ClickUp-only behavior.
expectations: Does not assume only Jira/ClickUp are supported ticket systems.
Performs provider capability discovery for configured non-built-in systems.
Asks permission before installing missing MCP connector.
Does not auto-select third-party bridge connectors unless the user explicitly opts in.
Attempts install/configuration when permission is granted.
Records degraded mode explicitly if install/configuration fails.

evals.prompt: /ProjectTracker AIA-999 Complete the schema migration checklist. Mapping already exists for this repo and ticket id is final.
evals.expected_output: Uses existing project map and clear ticket id without asking redundant setup or ticket-detail questions.
expectations: Skips setup prompts when mapping already exists for current project.
Does not ask additional ticket-identity questions when provided key matches configured pattern.
Proceeds directly to task preparation and execution workflow.

evals.prompt: /ProjectTracker AIA-1001 Move parent ticket and child ticket to In Review and log final time entry now.
evals.expected_output: Performs routine transition and time-log actions autonomously without extra end-user confirmation prompts.
expectations: Automatically executes routine ticket transition actions when target workflow state is clear.
Automatically logs/stops time when provider is enabled and configured.
Avoids unnecessary confirmation prompts for routine tracker/time operations.

evals.prompt: /ProjectTracker Use existing mapping and resolve issue status updates quietly unless a required detail is unknown.
evals.expected_output: Runs in low-interruption mode and only asks for user input on real blockers (missing connector, unresolved ticket target, unknown transition).
expectations: Applies prompt suppression when context is already complete.
Asks user input only for unknown/blocked actions.
Documents platform-imposed approval interruptions as constraints when they cannot be suppressed.
